name: Transform (JSONPath)
description: Extracts or reshapes JSON data using a simple dotted path expression. Example: `items.0.name` or `user.email`.

expr.description: Dotted path expression evaluated against the `data` input. Supports `.`, array indices, and `*` to flatten arrays.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The JSON value to extract from.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: The extracted value, or null if the path is missing.
